creator: sf@FreeBSD.org
text:
Is this software restricted? In LICENSE file, there are only 2-lines
description about copying this software that reads

|* copy the Software for archival purposes, provided any copy must
|  contain all of the original Software's proprietary notices.

I think copying archives `as is' is allowed by its author so we can
rip NO_CDROM/RESTRICTED off. I don't know about NO_PACKAGE. Can you
clarify this situation?

And, I suggest to show message that there are some LICENSE form at
install time.

Here's a list I changed:

o use DIST_SUBDIR=mupad due to DISTFILES don't have self-explanatory
  name.
o replace RUN_DEPENDS with USE_LINUX.
o replace WRKSRC= with NO_WRKSUBDIR.
o install manpages in specific places.
o tar -> ${TAR}, ${CP} -> ${INSTALL_DATA}
o ${CHOWN} files after install.
o replace bsd.ports.pre/post.mk with bsd.ports.mk.

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/k5/share/src/cvs/mupad/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.1.1.1
diff -u -r1.1.1.1 Makefile
--- Makefile	2001/02/28 08:48:04	1.1.1.1
+++ Makefile	2001/02/28 09:37:38
@@ -2,47 +2,49 @@
 # Date created:		2001/2/25
 # Whom:			Nakata Maho <chat95@mbox.kyoto-inet.or.jp>
 #
-# $FreeBSD: ports/math/mupad/Makefile,v $
+# $FreeBSD$
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	mupad
 PORTVERSION=	1.4.2
 CATEGORIES=	math
-MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.mupad.de/MuPAD/distrib/unix/ \
-		ftp://archives.cs.ehime-u.ac.jp/pub/MuPAD/distrib/unix/
-DISTFILES=	bin_linux_142.tgz share_142.tgz XVIEW/xview_linux.tgz
+MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.mupad.de/MuPAD/distrib/unix/%SUBDIR%/ \
+		ftp://archives.cs.ehime-u.ac.jp/pub/MuPAD/distrib/unix/%SUBDIR%/
+MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	. XVIEW
+DISTFILES=	bin_linux_142.tgz share_142.tgz xview_linux.tgz
+DIST_SUBDIR=	mupad
 
 MAINTAINER=	chat95@mbox.kyoto-inet.or.jp
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	${LINUXBASE}/lib/ld.so:${PORTSDIR}/emulators/linux_base
+USE_LINUX=	yes
 
-WRKSRC=         ${WRKDIR}
+NO_CDROM=	"NOT DISTRIBUTED FREELY, BUT CAN OBTAIN BINARY FREELY."
+NO_PACKAGE=	"NOT DISTRIBUTED FREELY, BUT CAN OBTAIN BINARY FREELY."
+RESTRICTED=	"NOT DISTRIBUTED FREELY, BUT CAN OBTAIN BINARY FREELY."
 
-NO_BUILD=	yes
-
-NO_CDROM=       "NOT DISTRIBUTED FREELY, BUT CAN OBTAIN BINARY FREELY."
-NO_PACKAGE=     "NOT DISTRIBUTED FREELY, BUT CAN OBTAIN BINARY FREELY."
-RESTRICTED=     "NOT DISTRIBUTED FREELY, BUT CAN OBTAIN BINARY FREELY."
-
 ONLY_FOR_ARCHS=	i386
 NO_FILTER_SHLIBS=yes
+
+NO_WRKSUBDIR=	yes
+NO_BUILD=	yes
 
-.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
+MAN1=	mmg.1 mupad.1 xmupad.1
+MANN=	xrastool.n xview.n
 
 do-install:
-	@${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/mupad
-	@${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/mupad/freebsd
-	@${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/mupad/freebsd/xview
-	@${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/mupad/share
-	@(find ${WRKDIR} -name "*.orig" -exec ${RM} {} \;)
-	@cd ${WRKDIR}/xview && tar cPf - . | tar xf - -C ${PREFIX}/mupad/freebsd/xview
-	@cd ${WRKDIR}/linux && tar cf  - . | tar xf - -C ${PREFIX}/mupad/freebsd
-	@cd ${WRKDIR}/share && tar cf  - . | tar xf - -C ${PREFIX}/mupad/share
-
-	@${CP} ${WRKDIR}/COPYRIGHT ${PREFIX}/mupad/
-	@${CP} ${WRKDIR}/INSTALL   ${PREFIX}/mupad/
-	@${CP} ${WRKDIR}/LICENSE   ${PREFIX}/mupad/
-	@${CP} ${WRKDIR}/LIC_EDU   ${PREFIX}/mupad/
-	@${CP} ${WRKDIR}/TroubleShooting ${PREFIX}/mupad/
+	@${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/mupad/freebsd/xview ${PREFIX}/mupad/share
+	find ${WRKSRC} -name "*.orig" | xargs ${RM}
+	${TAR} cf - -C ${WRKSRC}/xview . | ${TAR} xf - -C ${PREFIX}/mupad/freebsd/xview
+	${TAR} cf - -C ${WRKSRC}/linux . | ${TAR} xf - -C ${PREFIX}/mupad/freebsd
+	${TAR} cf - -C ${WRKSRC}/share . | ${TAR} xf - -C ${PREFIX}/mupad/share
+	${CHOWN} -R ${SHAREOWN}:${SHAREGRP} ${PREFIX}/mupad
+.for d in COPYRIGHT INSTALL LICENSE LIC_EDU TroubleShooting
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/$d ${PREFIX}/mupad
+.endfor
+.for section in 1 n
+.for d in ${MAN${section:U}}
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/share/doc/man/man${section}/$d ${PREFIX}/man/man${section}
+.endfor
+.endfor
 
-.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
+.include <bsd.port.mk>
